name: Azure IAM Over Privileged Contributor Role Assigned To A User
description: This model detects successful assignment of over-privileged Azure IAM Contributor role to a user which may indicate an attacker trying to escalate privileges to create and manage all resources in the Azure account to further compromise it.

rules.name: Azure IAM Over Privileged Contributor Role Assigned To A User

author: Yash Verma and Srivathsa H S
